_comment: L2 conformance — adds Sentry-aligned issue lifecycle to each warning. `fingerprint` lets the collector deduplicate identical failures across runs; `first_seen`/`last_seen`/`count` let consumers track frequency without storing every occurrence. This is the level AgentMinds recommends for production senders.

report.summary: Tool routing fell back to default twice in 24h

warnings.message: Unknown tool name; routed to default handler
